args:
echo "=== onExit: No persistent fault to clean up (app-level /status/503) ==="
echo "The /status/503 endpoint only affects the request that hits it."

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
VS="$K8S/apis/networking.istio.io/v1beta1/namespaces/podinfo/virtualservices/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}"

echo "=== onExit: Removing sidecar fault injection ==="

VS_JSON=$(curl -sf --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" "$VS" 2>/dev/null || echo "{}")
HAS_FAULT=$(echo "$VS_JSON" | grep -c '"fault"' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

if [ "$HAS_FAULT" -gt 0 ]; then
  HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sf -X PATCH \
    --cacert $CA \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
    "$VS" \
    -d '[{"op":"remove","path":"/spec/http/0/fault"}]' \
    -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}")
  echo "Fault removed (HTTP $HTTP_CODE)"
else
  echo "No fault found (has_fault=$HAS_FAULT) — nothing to clean up"
fi

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
PROM="{{workflow.parameters.prometheus-url}}"
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"
MODE="{{workflow.parameters.mesh-mode}}"
T0={{inputs.parameters.t0}}

echo "============================================================"
echo "  CHAOS EXPERIMENT RESULTS — $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
echo "============================================================"
echo ""
echo "Configuration:"
echo "  Mesh Mode:       $MODE"
echo "  Namespace:       $NS"
echo "  Stable Image:    {{workflow.parameters.stable-image}}"
echo "  Canary Image:    {{workflow.parameters.canary-image}}"
echo "  Fault Percent:   {{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}%"
echo "  Traffic Duration: {{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}}s"
echo ""

# T0: fault injection start (passed from earlier step)
echo "=== Timing Data (T0-T5) ==="

# T1/T2: captured live in the watch-promotion polling loop
T1_PENDING="{{inputs.parameters.t1}}"
T2_ALERT="{{inputs.parameters.t2}}"

if [ "$MODE" = "sidecar" ]; then
  STABLE_LABEL="destination_app=\"podinfo\",destination_workload_namespace=\"$NS\",reporter=\"destination\""
else
  STABLE_LABEL="destination_service_name=\"podinfo-stable\",destination_service_namespace=\"$NS\""
fi

# T4: check if a failover workflow ran (query K8s API for recent workflows)
# Use labelSelector if labels exist, fall back to name grep
FAILOVER_PREFIX="podinfo-failover-${MODE}"
WORKFLOWS=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/argo-events/workflows?labelSelector=triggered-by=prometheus-alert,failover-mode=${MODE}" \
  || echo "{}")
# Extract latest failover workflow name
# K8s API JSON uses "name": "value" with space after colon
T4_NAME=$(echo "$WORKFLOWS" | tr '\n' ' ' | grep -oE '"name": *"'"${FAILOVER_PREFIX}"'-[^".]*"' | sed 's/.*"name": *"\([^"]*\)"/\1/' | tail -1)
# Fallback: if label selector returned nothing, try without labels
if [ -z "$T4_NAME" ]; then
  WORKFLOWS_ALL=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
    "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/argo-events/workflows" || echo "{}")
  T4_NAME=$(echo "$WORKFLOWS_ALL" | tr '\n' ' ' | grep -oE '"name": *"'"${FAILOVER_PREFIX}"'-[^".]*"' | sed 's/.*"name": *"\([^"]*\)"/\1/' | tail -1)
fi
if [ -n "$T4_NAME" ]; then
  T4_WORKFLOW="name=$T4_NAME"
else
  T4_WORKFLOW="No failover workflow found"
fi

# Get rollout final status
ROLLOUT=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/$NS/rollouts/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}")
COMPACT_R=$(echo "$ROLLOUT" | tr -d '\n' | tr -s ' ')
ROLLOUT_PHASE=$(echo "$COMPACT_R" | grep -oE '"phase": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/')
ROLLOUT_PHASE="${ROLLOUT_PHASE:-?}"
ROLLOUT_MSG=$(echo "$COMPACT_R" | grep -oE '"message": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/')
ROLLOUT_MSG="${ROLLOUT_MSG:-}"

T5=$(date +%s)

echo "  T0 (fault injected):     $T0"
echo "  T1 (alert pending):      $T1_PENDING"
echo "  T2 (alert firing):       $T2_ALERT"
echo "  T4 (failover workflow):  $T4_WORKFLOW"
echo "  T5 (collection time):    $T5"
echo ""

# Compute deltas
if [ "$T1_PENDING" != "N/A" ]; then
  DELTA_T0_T1=$((T1_PENDING - T0))
  echo "  T0→T1 (fault → alert pending): ${DELTA_T0_T1}s"
fi
if [ "$T2_ALERT" != "N/A" ]; then
  DELTA_T0_T2=$((T2_ALERT - T0))
  echo "  T0→T2 (fault → alert firing):  ${DELTA_T0_T2}s"
fi
if [ "$T1_PENDING" != "N/A" ] && [ "$T2_ALERT" != "N/A" ]; then
  DELTA_T1_T2=$((T2_ALERT - T1_PENDING))
  echo "  T1→T2 (pending → firing):      ${DELTA_T1_T2}s"
fi
DELTA_TOTAL=$((T5 - T0))
echo "  T0→T5 (total experiment):      ${DELTA_TOTAL}s"
echo ""

# Query current error rates from Prometheus
echo "=== Prometheus Metrics Snapshot ==="

if [ "$MODE" = "sidecar" ]; then
  ERR_Q="sum(rate(istio_requests_total{destination_app=\"podinfo\",destination_workload_namespace=\"$NS\",response_code=~\"5.*\",reporter=\"destination\"}[1m])) / sum(rate(istio_requests_total{destination_app=\"podinfo\",destination_workload_namespace=\"$NS\",reporter=\"destination\"}[1m]))"
  LAT_Q="histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(istio_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{destination_app=\"podinfo\",destination_workload_namespace=\"$NS\",reporter=\"destination\"}[1m])) by (le))"
else
  ERR_Q="sum(rate(istio_requests_total{destination_service_name=\"podinfo-stable\",destination_service_namespace=\"$NS\",response_code=~\"5.*\"}[1m])) / sum(rate(istio_requests_total{destination_service_name=\"podinfo-stable\",destination_service_namespace=\"$NS\"}[1m]))"
  LAT_Q="histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(istio_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{destination_service_name=\"podinfo-stable\",destination_service_namespace=\"$NS\"}[1m])) by (le))"
fi

ERR_RATE=$(curl -sf "$PROM/api/v1/query" --data-urlencode "query=$ERR_Q" | \
  grep -oE '"value":\[[^,]+,"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4 | head -1)
ERR_RATE="${ERR_RATE:-no-data}"
P99_LAT=$(curl -sf "$PROM/api/v1/query" --data-urlencode "query=$LAT_Q" | \
  grep -oE '"value":\[[^,]+,"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4 | head -1)
P99_LAT="${P99_LAT:-no-data}"

echo "  Stable error rate (1m): $ERR_RATE"
echo "  Stable p99 latency (1m): ${P99_LAT}ms"
echo ""

echo "=== Rollout Final State ==="
echo "  Phase:   $ROLLOUT_PHASE"
echo "  Message: $ROLLOUT_MSG"
echo ""

FAULT_PCT={{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}
FAILOVER_RAN="false"
if [ -n "$T4_NAME" ]; then
  FAILOVER_RAN="true"
fi

if [ "$ROLLOUT_PHASE" = "Healthy" ]; then
  if [ "$FAULT_PCT" -eq 0 ]; then
    OUTCOME="true_negative"
    echo "RESULT: PASS — No fault injected, canary promoted correctly (true negative)"
  elif [ "$FAILOVER_RAN" = "true" ]; then
    OUTCOME="remediated"
    echo "RESULT: PASS — Fault detected, failover promoted canary ($T4_NAME)"
  else
    OUTCOME="false_negative"
    echo "RESULT: FAIL — Fault injected but canary was NOT aborted (false negative)"
  fi
elif [ "$ROLLOUT_PHASE" = "Degraded" ]; then
  if [ "$FAULT_PCT" -eq 0 ]; then
    OUTCOME="false_positive"
    echo "RESULT: FAIL — No fault injected but canary was aborted (false positive)"
  else
    OUTCOME="remediated"
    echo "RESULT: PASS — Canary correctly rejected (phase=Degraded)"
  fi
else
  OUTCOME="incomplete"
  echo "RESULT: INCOMPLETE — Rollout phase=$ROLLOUT_PHASE (expected Healthy or Degraded)"
fi

echo ""
echo "============================================================"

# ── Structured JSON output for thesis analysis ──
# Emit null for N/A values so JSON stays valid
T1_JSON="${T1_PENDING}"; [ "$T1_JSON" = "N/A" ] && T1_JSON="null"
T2_JSON="${T2_ALERT}"; [ "$T2_JSON" = "N/A" ] && T2_JSON="null"
DT01="${DELTA_T0_T1:-null}"
DT12="${DELTA_T1_T2:-null}"
DT02="${DELTA_T0_T2:-null}"
cat > /tmp/timing.json <<ENDJSON
{
  "experiment_id": "$(cat /proc/sys/kernel/random/uuid 2>/dev/null || echo $RANDOM-$RANDOM)",
  "timestamp": "$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')",
  "mesh_mode": "$MODE",
  "fault_percentage": {{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}},
  "traffic_duration_s": {{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}},
  "timing": {
    "t0_fault_injected": $T0,
    "t1_alert_pending": $T1_JSON,
    "t2_alert_firing": $T2_JSON,
    "t4_failover_workflow": "$T4_WORKFLOW",
    "t5_collection": $T5
  },
  "deltas_seconds": {
    "t0_to_t1": $DT01,
    "t1_to_t2": $DT12,
    "t0_to_t2": $DT02,
    "t0_to_t5": $DELTA_TOTAL
  },
  "metrics_snapshot": {
    "stable_error_rate": "$ERR_RATE",
    "stable_p99_latency_ms": "$P99_LAT"
  },
  "rollout": {
    "phase": "$ROLLOUT_PHASE",
    "message": "$ROLLOUT_MSG"
  },
  "outcome": "$OUTCOME"
}
ENDJSON
echo "JSON artifact written to /tmp/timing.json"
echo "---TIMING-JSON-START---"
cat /tmp/timing.json
echo "---TIMING-JSON-END---"

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"
ROLLOUT_NAME="{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}"

echo "=== Disabling AnalysisTemplate steps for experiment ==="

# Replace canary steps: keep setWeight + pause, remove analysis.
# Pauses must be >= 2m so alerts (for: 1m) have time to fire
# during canary progression before it reaches 100%.
PATCH='{
  "spec": {
    "strategy": {
      "canary": {
        "steps": [
          {"setWeight": 10},
          {"pause": {"duration": "2m"}},
          {"setWeight": 30},
          {"pause": {"duration": "2m"}},
          {"setWeight": 50},
          {"pause": {"duration": "2m"}},
          {"setWeight": 100}
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}'

RESULT=$(curl -sf -X PATCH \
  --cacert $CA \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/merge-patch+json" \
  "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/$NS/rollouts/$ROLLOUT_NAME" \
  -d "$PATCH" -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}")

if [ "$RESULT" = "200" ]; then
  echo "Analysis steps removed successfully"
  echo "Steps: setWeight(10)->pause(2m)->setWeight(30)->pause(2m)->setWeight(50)->pause(2m)->setWeight(100)"
else
  echo "WARNING: Failed to patch rollout (HTTP $RESULT)"
  echo "AnalysisTemplate may race with event-driven pipeline"
fi

SVC="{{inputs.parameters.stable-svc}}"
CANARY_SVC=$(echo "$SVC" | sed 's/podinfo-stable/podinfo-canary/')
FAULT_PCT={{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}
TOTAL=$(({{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}} + 300))

echo "=== Sustained traffic (${TOTAL}s, ~10 req/s) ==="
echo "  Stable: $SVC"
echo "  Canary: $CANARY_SVC"
echo "  Fault %: ${FAULT_PCT}% of stable requests → /status/503"

COUNT=0
ERRORS=0
END=$(($(date +%s) + TOTAL))

while [ "$(date +%s)" -lt "$END" ]; do
  # Stable traffic: FAULT_PCT% hit /status/503, rest hit /
  RAND=$((RANDOM % 100))
  if [ "$RAND" -lt "$FAULT_PCT" ]; then
    curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$SVC/status/503" 2>/dev/null &
    ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
  else
    curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$SVC/" 2>/dev/null &
  fi
  # Canary traffic: always healthy
  curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$CANARY_SVC/" 2>/dev/null &
  wait
  COUNT=$((COUNT + 2))
  [ $((COUNT % 200)) -eq 0 ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Traffic: $COUNT (503s: $ERRORS)"
  sleep 0.2
done

PCT=0
[ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ] && PCT=$((ERRORS * 100 / COUNT))
echo "Sustained traffic done — $COUNT requests, $ERRORS errors (${PCT}%)"

SVC="{{inputs.parameters.stable-svc}}"
DURATION={{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}}

echo "=== Traffic generation (${DURATION}s, ~20 req/s) ==="
echo "Target: $SVC"

COUNT=0
ERRORS=0
END=$(($(date +%s) + DURATION))

while [ $(date +%s) -lt $END ]; do
  STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 2 "$SVC/" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
  COUNT=$((COUNT + 1))
  [ "$STATUS" = "503" ] || [ "$STATUS" = "500" ] && ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))

  if [ $((COUNT % 200)) -eq 0 ]; then
    PCT=$(( ERRORS * 100 / COUNT ))
    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Requests: $COUNT | 5xx: $ERRORS (${PCT}%)"
  fi
  sleep 0.05
done

PCT=$(( ERRORS * 100 / COUNT ))
echo "Traffic done — $COUNT requests, $ERRORS errors (${PCT}%)"

SVC="{{inputs.parameters.stable-svc}}"
# Derive canary URL from stable URL
CANARY_SVC=$(echo "$SVC" | sed 's/podinfo-stable/podinfo-canary/')

echo "=== Generating warmup traffic for 60s ==="
echo "  Stable: $SVC"
echo "  Canary: $CANARY_SVC"

END=$(($(date +%s) + 60))
COUNT=0
while [ "$(date +%s)" -lt "$END" ]; do
  curl -sf -o /dev/null "$SVC/" 2>/dev/null &
  curl -sf -o /dev/null "$CANARY_SVC/" 2>/dev/null &
  wait
  COUNT=$((COUNT + 2))
  sleep 0.3
done

echo "Warmup complete: sent ~$COUNT requests over 60s"

SVC="{{inputs.parameters.stable-svc}}"
DURATION={{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}}
FAULT_PCT={{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}

echo "=== Injecting errors (ambient mode) ==="
echo "Target: $SVC/status/503"
echo "Fault rate: ~${FAULT_PCT}% of requests will hit /status/503"
echo "Duration: ${DURATION}s"

COUNT=0
ERRORS=0
END=$(($(date +%s) + DURATION))

while [ "$(date +%s)" -lt "$END" ]; do
  RAND=$((RANDOM % 100))
  if [ "$RAND" -lt "$FAULT_PCT" ]; then
    curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$SVC/status/503" 2>/dev/null || true
    ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
  else
    curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$SVC/" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
  COUNT=$((COUNT + 1))

  if [ $((COUNT % 100)) -eq 0 ]; then
    PCT=$((ERRORS * 100 / COUNT))
    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Requests: $COUNT | 503s: $ERRORS (${PCT}%)"
  fi
  sleep 0.05
done

PCT=$((ERRORS * 100 / COUNT))
echo "Ambient fault injection done: $COUNT requests, $ERRORS errors (${PCT}%)"

FAULT_PCT={{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}
echo "=== Fault injection via sustained traffic ==="
echo "  ${FAULT_PCT}% of stable requests -> /status/503"
echo "  Waiting 10s for traffic to start generating errors..."
sleep 10
echo "  Gate open — watch-promotion will begin polling"

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"

echo "=== Injecting Istio fault (sidecar mode) ==="
echo "Target: $NS/virtualservice/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}"
echo "Fault:  abort {{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}% requests with 503"

PATCH="[{\"op\":\"add\",\"path\":\"/spec/http/0/fault\",\"value\":{\"abort\":{\"httpStatus\":503,\"percentage\":{\"value\":{{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}}}}}]"

RESULT=$(curl -sf -X PATCH \
  --cacert $CA \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
  "$K8S/apis/networking.istio.io/v1beta1/namespaces/$NS/virtualservices/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}" \
  -d "$PATCH" -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}")

if [ "$RESULT" = "200" ]; then
  echo "Fault injection active (HTTP $RESULT)"
else
  echo "ERROR: Fault injection failed (HTTP $RESULT)"
  exit 1
fi

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
ACTION="{{inputs.parameters.action}}"

if [ "$ACTION" = "add" ]; then
  echo "Adding ambient mesh label to argo-events namespace"
  PATCH='[{"op":"add","path":"/metadata/labels/istio.io~1dataplane-mode","value":"ambient"}]'
else
  echo "Removing ambient mesh label from argo-events namespace"
  PATCH='[{"op":"remove","path":"/metadata/labels/istio.io~1dataplane-mode"}]'
fi

RESULT=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -X PATCH "$K8S/api/v1/namespaces/argo-events" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
  -d "$PATCH" -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null)

echo "Result: HTTP $RESULT"
if [ "$RESULT" = "200" ]; then
  echo "Namespace label updated successfully"
  # Wait for ztunnel to pick up the change
  sleep 5
else
  echo "WARNING: Failed to update namespace label (HTTP $RESULT)"
fi

MODE="{{workflow.parameters.mesh-mode}}"
echo "=== Resolving parameters for mesh-mode: $MODE ==="

if [ "$MODE" = "sidecar" ]; then
  echo "podinfo" > /tmp/namespace
  # Use port 80 (Service port), not 9898 (container targetPort).
  # Traffic must go through the Service for the sidecar proxy to
  # correctly attribute destination_service in istio_requests_total.
  echo "http://podinfo-stable.podinfo.svc.cluster.local" > /tmp/stable-svc
elif [ "$MODE" = "ambient" ]; then
  echo "podinfo-ambient" > /tmp/namespace
  # Use port 80 (service port) not 9898 (container port).
  # Traffic must go through the service for the waypoint proxy to
  # observe it and generate istio_requests_total metrics.
  echo "http://podinfo-stable.podinfo-ambient.svc.cluster.local" > /tmp/stable-svc
else
  echo "ERROR: Unknown mesh-mode: $MODE"
  exit 1
fi

echo "Namespace: $(cat /tmp/namespace)"
echo "Stable SVC: $(cat /tmp/stable-svc)"

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"
PROM="{{workflow.parameters.prometheus-url}}"
MODE="{{workflow.parameters.mesh-mode}}"

# Alert name pattern per mesh mode
if [ "$MODE" = "sidecar" ]; then
  ALERT_PATTERN="PodInfoStable.*"
else
  ALERT_PATTERN="PodInfoAmbient.*"
fi

# Initialize T1/T2 tracking files
echo "N/A" > /tmp/t1_pending
echo "N/A" > /tmp/t2_firing
T1_CAPTURED=false
T2_CAPTURED=false

echo "=== Watching for automatic promotion (max 10 minutes) ==="
echo "Pipeline: PrometheusRule -> Alertmanager -> Argo Events -> Failover Workflow -> Promote"
echo "Alert pattern: $ALERT_PATTERN"
echo ""

i=0
PREV_PHASE=""
while [ $i -lt 60 ]; do
  ROLLOUT=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
    "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/$NS/rollouts/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}")

  COMPACT=$(echo "$ROLLOUT" | tr -d '\n' | tr -s ' ')
  PHASE=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"phase": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/')
  PHASE="${PHASE:-?}"
  STEP=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"currentStepIndex": *[0-9]+' | head -1 | grep -oE '[0-9]+')
  STEP="${STEP:-?}"
  ABORT=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"abort": *(true|false)' | head -1 | grep -oE 'true\|false')
  ABORT="${ABORT:-false}"
  MSG=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"message": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/')
  MSG="${MSG:-}"

  # ── T1/T2 capture: query Prometheus for alert state ──
  if [ "$T1_CAPTURED" = false ]; then
    FOR_DATA=$(curl -sf "$PROM/api/v1/query" \
      --data-urlencode "query=ALERTS_FOR_STATE{alertname=~\"${ALERT_PATTERN}\"}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    FOR_VAL=$(echo "$FOR_DATA" | grep -oE '"value":\[[^,]+,"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4 | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
    if [ -n "$FOR_VAL" ] && [ "$FOR_VAL" != "" ]; then
      echo "$FOR_VAL" > /tmp/t1_pending
      T1_CAPTURED=true
      echo "  >> T1 CAPTURED: alert pending since $FOR_VAL"
    fi
  fi

  if [ "$T2_CAPTURED" = false ]; then
    ALERT_DATA=$(curl -sf "$PROM/api/v1/query" \
      --data-urlencode "query=ALERTS{alertname=~\"${ALERT_PATTERN}\",alertstate=\"firing\"}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    ALERT_TS=$(echo "$ALERT_DATA" | grep -oE '"value":\[[0-9.]+' | grep -oE '[0-9.]+$' | head -1 | cut -d. -f1)
    if [ -n "$ALERT_TS" ] && [ "$ALERT_TS" != "" ]; then
      echo "$ALERT_TS" > /tmp/t2_firing
      T2_CAPTURED=true
      echo "  >> T2 CAPTURED: alert firing at $ALERT_TS"
    fi
  fi

  [ "$PHASE" != "$PREV_PHASE" ] && echo "--- Phase change: $PREV_PHASE -> $PHASE ---"
  echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Phase: $PHASE | Step: $STEP | Abort: $ABORT | T1:$(cat /tmp/t1_pending) T2:$(cat /tmp/t2_firing)${MSG:+ | $MSG}"
  PREV_PHASE=$PHASE

  if [ "$PHASE" = "Healthy" ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "SUCCESS: Canary promoted to 100%!"
    date +%s > /tmp/t5_promotion_complete
    exit 0
  fi

  if [ "$PHASE" = "Degraded" ] || [ "$ABORT" = "true" ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "REMEDIATED: Canary was correctly rejected (phase=$PHASE, abort=$ABORT)"
    echo "  Message: $MSG"
    date +%s > /tmp/t5_remediation_complete
    exit 0
  fi

  i=$((i + 1))
  sleep 10
done

echo ""
echo "TIMEOUT: Rollout was not promoted within 10 minutes"
exit 1

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"
TIMEOUT={{inputs.parameters.timeout}}

echo "=== Waiting for canary to receive traffic weight > 0 ==="

i=0
while [ $i -lt $TIMEOUT ]; do
  ROLLOUT=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
    "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/$NS/rollouts/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}")
  CURL_EXIT=$?

  if [ $CURL_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] curl failed (exit=$CURL_EXIT)"
  elif echo "$ROLLOUT" | grep -q '"kind":"Status"'; then
    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] API error"
  else
    # Compact JSON to single line (K8s API returns pretty-printed multi-line)
    COMPACT=$(echo "$ROLLOUT" | tr -d '\n' | tr -s ' ')

    # Parse phase and step from compact JSON
    PHASE=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"phase": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | grep -oE '"[A-Z][a-z]*"' | tr -d '"')
    STEP=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"currentStepIndex": *[0-9]+' | head -1 | grep -oE '[0-9]+')
    PHASE="${PHASE:-unknown}"
    STEP="${STEP:-0}"

    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Phase: $PHASE, Step: $STEP"

    # Canary is active when phase is Progressing/Paused and step >= 1
    if [ "$STEP" -ge 1 ] && [ "$PHASE" != "Degraded" ] && [ "$PHASE" != "Healthy" ] && [ "$PHASE" != "unknown" ]; then
      echo "Canary is active (phase=$PHASE, step=$STEP)"
      exit 0
    fi

    if [ "$PHASE" = "Degraded" ]; then
      echo "ERROR: Rollout degraded — analysis aborted the canary"
      exit 1
    fi
  fi

  i=$((i + 5))
  sleep 5
done

echo "TIMEOUT: Canary never received traffic weight within ${TIMEOUT}s"
exit 1

MODE="{{workflow.parameters.mesh-mode}}"
echo "=== Resolving parameters for mesh-mode: $MODE ==="

if [ "$MODE" = "sidecar" ]; then
  echo "podinfo" > /tmp/namespace
  # Use port 80 (Service port), not 9898 (container targetPort).
  # Traffic must go through the Service for the sidecar proxy to
  # correctly attribute destination_service in istio_requests_total.
  echo "http://podinfo-stable.podinfo.svc.cluster.local" > /tmp/stable-svc
elif [ "$MODE" = "ambient" ]; then
  echo "podinfo-ambient" > /tmp/namespace
  # Use port 80 (service port) not 9898 (container port).
  # Traffic must go through the service for the waypoint proxy to
  # observe it and generate istio_requests_total metrics.
  echo "http://podinfo-stable.podinfo-ambient.svc.cluster.local" > /tmp/stable-svc
else
  echo "ERROR: Unknown mesh-mode: $MODE"
  exit 1
fi

echo "Namespace: $(cat /tmp/namespace)"
echo "Stable SVC: $(cat /tmp/stable-svc)"

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
ACTION="{{inputs.parameters.action}}"

if [ "$ACTION" = "add" ]; then
  echo "Adding ambient mesh label to argo-events namespace"
  PATCH='[{"op":"add","path":"/metadata/labels/istio.io~1dataplane-mode","value":"ambient"}]'
else
  echo "Removing ambient mesh label from argo-events namespace"
  PATCH='[{"op":"remove","path":"/metadata/labels/istio.io~1dataplane-mode"}]'
fi

RESULT=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -X PATCH "$K8S/api/v1/namespaces/argo-events" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
  -d "$PATCH" -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null)

echo "Result: HTTP $RESULT"
if [ "$RESULT" = "200" ]; then
  echo "Namespace label updated successfully"
  # Wait for ztunnel to pick up the change
  sleep 5
else
  echo "WARNING: Failed to update namespace label (HTTP $RESULT)"
fi

SVC="{{inputs.parameters.stable-svc}}"
# Derive canary URL from stable URL
CANARY_SVC=$(echo "$SVC" | sed 's/podinfo-stable/podinfo-canary/')

echo "=== Generating warmup traffic for 60s ==="
echo "  Stable: $SVC"
echo "  Canary: $CANARY_SVC"

END=$(($(date +%s) + 60))
COUNT=0
while [ "$(date +%s)" -lt "$END" ]; do
  curl -sf -o /dev/null "$SVC/" 2>/dev/null &
  curl -sf -o /dev/null "$CANARY_SVC/" 2>/dev/null &
  wait
  COUNT=$((COUNT + 2))
  sleep 0.3
done

echo "Warmup complete: sent ~$COUNT requests over 60s"

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"
ROLLOUT_NAME="{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}"

echo "=== Disabling AnalysisTemplate steps for experiment ==="

# Replace canary steps: keep setWeight + pause, remove analysis.
# Pauses must be >= 2m so alerts (for: 1m) have time to fire
# during canary progression before it reaches 100%.
PATCH='{
  "spec": {
    "strategy": {
      "canary": {
        "steps": [
          {"setWeight": 10},
          {"pause": {"duration": "2m"}},
          {"setWeight": 30},
          {"pause": {"duration": "2m"}},
          {"setWeight": 50},
          {"pause": {"duration": "2m"}},
          {"setWeight": 100}
        ]
      }
    }
  }
}'

RESULT=$(curl -sf -X PATCH \
  --cacert $CA \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/merge-patch+json" \
  "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/$NS/rollouts/$ROLLOUT_NAME" \
  -d "$PATCH" -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}")

if [ "$RESULT" = "200" ]; then
  echo "Analysis steps removed successfully"
  echo "Steps: setWeight(10)->pause(2m)->setWeight(30)->pause(2m)->setWeight(50)->pause(2m)->setWeight(100)"
else
  echo "WARNING: Failed to patch rollout (HTTP $RESULT)"
  echo "AnalysisTemplate may race with event-driven pipeline"
fi

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"
TIMEOUT={{inputs.parameters.timeout}}

echo "=== Waiting for canary to receive traffic weight > 0 ==="

i=0
while [ $i -lt $TIMEOUT ]; do
  ROLLOUT=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
    "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/$NS/rollouts/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}")
  CURL_EXIT=$?

  if [ $CURL_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] curl failed (exit=$CURL_EXIT)"
  elif echo "$ROLLOUT" | grep -q '"kind":"Status"'; then
    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] API error"
  else
    # Compact JSON to single line (K8s API returns pretty-printed multi-line)
    COMPACT=$(echo "$ROLLOUT" | tr -d '\n' | tr -s ' ')

    # Parse phase and step from compact JSON
    PHASE=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"phase": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | grep -oE '"[A-Z][a-z]*"' | tr -d '"')
    STEP=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"currentStepIndex": *[0-9]+' | head -1 | grep -oE '[0-9]+')
    PHASE="${PHASE:-unknown}"
    STEP="${STEP:-0}"

    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Phase: $PHASE, Step: $STEP"

    # Canary is active when phase is Progressing/Paused and step >= 1
    if [ "$STEP" -ge 1 ] && [ "$PHASE" != "Degraded" ] && [ "$PHASE" != "Healthy" ] && [ "$PHASE" != "unknown" ]; then
      echo "Canary is active (phase=$PHASE, step=$STEP)"
      exit 0
    fi

    if [ "$PHASE" = "Degraded" ]; then
      echo "ERROR: Rollout degraded — analysis aborted the canary"
      exit 1
    fi
  fi

  i=$((i + 5))
  sleep 5
done

echo "TIMEOUT: Canary never received traffic weight within ${TIMEOUT}s"
exit 1

FAULT_PCT={{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}
echo "=== Fault injection via sustained traffic ==="
echo "  ${FAULT_PCT}% of stable requests -> /status/503"
echo "  Waiting 10s for traffic to start generating errors..."
sleep 10
echo "  Gate open — watch-promotion will begin polling"

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"

echo "=== Injecting Istio fault (sidecar mode) ==="
echo "Target: $NS/virtualservice/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}"
echo "Fault:  abort {{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}% requests with 503"

PATCH="[{\"op\":\"add\",\"path\":\"/spec/http/0/fault\",\"value\":{\"abort\":{\"httpStatus\":503,\"percentage\":{\"value\":{{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}}}}}]"

RESULT=$(curl -sf -X PATCH \
  --cacert $CA \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
  "$K8S/apis/networking.istio.io/v1beta1/namespaces/$NS/virtualservices/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}" \
  -d "$PATCH" -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}")

if [ "$RESULT" = "200" ]; then
  echo "Fault injection active (HTTP $RESULT)"
else
  echo "ERROR: Fault injection failed (HTTP $RESULT)"
  exit 1
fi

SVC="{{inputs.parameters.stable-svc}}"
DURATION={{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}}
FAULT_PCT={{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}

echo "=== Injecting errors (ambient mode) ==="
echo "Target: $SVC/status/503"
echo "Fault rate: ~${FAULT_PCT}% of requests will hit /status/503"
echo "Duration: ${DURATION}s"

COUNT=0
ERRORS=0
END=$(($(date +%s) + DURATION))

while [ "$(date +%s)" -lt "$END" ]; do
  RAND=$((RANDOM % 100))
  if [ "$RAND" -lt "$FAULT_PCT" ]; then
    curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$SVC/status/503" 2>/dev/null || true
    ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
  else
    curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$SVC/" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
  COUNT=$((COUNT + 1))

  if [ $((COUNT % 100)) -eq 0 ]; then
    PCT=$((ERRORS * 100 / COUNT))
    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Requests: $COUNT | 503s: $ERRORS (${PCT}%)"
  fi
  sleep 0.05
done

PCT=$((ERRORS * 100 / COUNT))
echo "Ambient fault injection done: $COUNT requests, $ERRORS errors (${PCT}%)"

SVC="{{inputs.parameters.stable-svc}}"
DURATION={{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}}

echo "=== Traffic generation (${DURATION}s, ~20 req/s) ==="
echo "Target: $SVC"

COUNT=0
ERRORS=0
END=$(($(date +%s) + DURATION))

while [ $(date +%s) -lt $END ]; do
  STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 2 "$SVC/" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
  COUNT=$((COUNT + 1))
  [ "$STATUS" = "503" ] || [ "$STATUS" = "500" ] && ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))

  if [ $((COUNT % 200)) -eq 0 ]; then
    PCT=$(( ERRORS * 100 / COUNT ))
    echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Requests: $COUNT | 5xx: $ERRORS (${PCT}%)"
  fi
  sleep 0.05
done

PCT=$(( ERRORS * 100 / COUNT ))
echo "Traffic done — $COUNT requests, $ERRORS errors (${PCT}%)"

SVC="{{inputs.parameters.stable-svc}}"
CANARY_SVC=$(echo "$SVC" | sed 's/podinfo-stable/podinfo-canary/')
FAULT_PCT={{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}
TOTAL=$(({{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}} + 300))

echo "=== Sustained traffic (${TOTAL}s, ~10 req/s) ==="
echo "  Stable: $SVC"
echo "  Canary: $CANARY_SVC"
echo "  Fault %: ${FAULT_PCT}% of stable requests → /status/503"

COUNT=0
ERRORS=0
END=$(($(date +%s) + TOTAL))

while [ "$(date +%s)" -lt "$END" ]; do
  # Stable traffic: FAULT_PCT% hit /status/503, rest hit /
  RAND=$((RANDOM % 100))
  if [ "$RAND" -lt "$FAULT_PCT" ]; then
    curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$SVC/status/503" 2>/dev/null &
    ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
  else
    curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$SVC/" 2>/dev/null &
  fi
  # Canary traffic: always healthy
  curl -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 "$CANARY_SVC/" 2>/dev/null &
  wait
  COUNT=$((COUNT + 2))
  [ $((COUNT % 200)) -eq 0 ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Traffic: $COUNT (503s: $ERRORS)"
  sleep 0.2
done

PCT=0
[ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ] && PCT=$((ERRORS * 100 / COUNT))
echo "Sustained traffic done — $COUNT requests, $ERRORS errors (${PCT}%)"

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"
PROM="{{workflow.parameters.prometheus-url}}"
MODE="{{workflow.parameters.mesh-mode}}"

# Alert name pattern per mesh mode
if [ "$MODE" = "sidecar" ]; then
  ALERT_PATTERN="PodInfoStable.*"
else
  ALERT_PATTERN="PodInfoAmbient.*"
fi

# Initialize T1/T2 tracking files
echo "N/A" > /tmp/t1_pending
echo "N/A" > /tmp/t2_firing
T1_CAPTURED=false
T2_CAPTURED=false

echo "=== Watching for automatic promotion (max 10 minutes) ==="
echo "Pipeline: PrometheusRule -> Alertmanager -> Argo Events -> Failover Workflow -> Promote"
echo "Alert pattern: $ALERT_PATTERN"
echo ""

i=0
PREV_PHASE=""
while [ $i -lt 60 ]; do
  ROLLOUT=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
    "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/$NS/rollouts/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}")

  COMPACT=$(echo "$ROLLOUT" | tr -d '\n' | tr -s ' ')
  PHASE=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"phase": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/')
  PHASE="${PHASE:-?}"
  STEP=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"currentStepIndex": *[0-9]+' | head -1 | grep -oE '[0-9]+')
  STEP="${STEP:-?}"
  ABORT=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"abort": *(true|false)' | head -1 | grep -oE 'true\|false')
  ABORT="${ABORT:-false}"
  MSG=$(echo "$COMPACT" | grep -oE '"message": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/')
  MSG="${MSG:-}"

  # ── T1/T2 capture: query Prometheus for alert state ──
  if [ "$T1_CAPTURED" = false ]; then
    FOR_DATA=$(curl -sf "$PROM/api/v1/query" \
      --data-urlencode "query=ALERTS_FOR_STATE{alertname=~\"${ALERT_PATTERN}\"}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    FOR_VAL=$(echo "$FOR_DATA" | grep -oE '"value":\[[^,]+,"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4 | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
    if [ -n "$FOR_VAL" ] && [ "$FOR_VAL" != "" ]; then
      echo "$FOR_VAL" > /tmp/t1_pending
      T1_CAPTURED=true
      echo "  >> T1 CAPTURED: alert pending since $FOR_VAL"
    fi
  fi

  if [ "$T2_CAPTURED" = false ]; then
    ALERT_DATA=$(curl -sf "$PROM/api/v1/query" \
      --data-urlencode "query=ALERTS{alertname=~\"${ALERT_PATTERN}\",alertstate=\"firing\"}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    ALERT_TS=$(echo "$ALERT_DATA" | grep -oE '"value":\[[0-9.]+' | grep -oE '[0-9.]+$' | head -1 | cut -d. -f1)
    if [ -n "$ALERT_TS" ] && [ "$ALERT_TS" != "" ]; then
      echo "$ALERT_TS" > /tmp/t2_firing
      T2_CAPTURED=true
      echo "  >> T2 CAPTURED: alert firing at $ALERT_TS"
    fi
  fi

  [ "$PHASE" != "$PREV_PHASE" ] && echo "--- Phase change: $PREV_PHASE -> $PHASE ---"
  echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] Phase: $PHASE | Step: $STEP | Abort: $ABORT | T1:$(cat /tmp/t1_pending) T2:$(cat /tmp/t2_firing)${MSG:+ | $MSG}"
  PREV_PHASE=$PHASE

  if [ "$PHASE" = "Healthy" ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "SUCCESS: Canary promoted to 100%!"
    date +%s > /tmp/t5_promotion_complete
    exit 0
  fi

  if [ "$PHASE" = "Degraded" ] || [ "$ABORT" = "true" ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "REMEDIATED: Canary was correctly rejected (phase=$PHASE, abort=$ABORT)"
    echo "  Message: $MSG"
    date +%s > /tmp/t5_remediation_complete
    exit 0
  fi

  i=$((i + 1))
  sleep 10
done

echo ""
echo "TIMEOUT: Rollout was not promoted within 10 minutes"
exit 1

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
PROM="{{workflow.parameters.prometheus-url}}"
NS="{{inputs.parameters.namespace}}"
MODE="{{workflow.parameters.mesh-mode}}"
T0={{inputs.parameters.t0}}

echo "============================================================"
echo "  CHAOS EXPERIMENT RESULTS — $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
echo "============================================================"
echo ""
echo "Configuration:"
echo "  Mesh Mode:       $MODE"
echo "  Namespace:       $NS"
echo "  Stable Image:    {{workflow.parameters.stable-image}}"
echo "  Canary Image:    {{workflow.parameters.canary-image}}"
echo "  Fault Percent:   {{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}%"
echo "  Traffic Duration: {{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}}s"
echo ""

# T0: fault injection start (passed from earlier step)
echo "=== Timing Data (T0-T5) ==="

# T1/T2: captured live in the watch-promotion polling loop
T1_PENDING="{{inputs.parameters.t1}}"
T2_ALERT="{{inputs.parameters.t2}}"

if [ "$MODE" = "sidecar" ]; then
  STABLE_LABEL="destination_app=\"podinfo\",destination_workload_namespace=\"$NS\",reporter=\"destination\""
else
  STABLE_LABEL="destination_service_name=\"podinfo-stable\",destination_service_namespace=\"$NS\""
fi

# T4: check if a failover workflow ran (query K8s API for recent workflows)
# Use labelSelector if labels exist, fall back to name grep
FAILOVER_PREFIX="podinfo-failover-${MODE}"
WORKFLOWS=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/argo-events/workflows?labelSelector=triggered-by=prometheus-alert,failover-mode=${MODE}" \
  || echo "{}")
# Extract latest failover workflow name
# K8s API JSON uses "name": "value" with space after colon
T4_NAME=$(echo "$WORKFLOWS" | tr '\n' ' ' | grep -oE '"name": *"'"${FAILOVER_PREFIX}"'-[^".]*"' | sed 's/.*"name": *"\([^"]*\)"/\1/' | tail -1)
# Fallback: if label selector returned nothing, try without labels
if [ -z "$T4_NAME" ]; then
  WORKFLOWS_ALL=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
    "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/argo-events/workflows" || echo "{}")
  T4_NAME=$(echo "$WORKFLOWS_ALL" | tr '\n' ' ' | grep -oE '"name": *"'"${FAILOVER_PREFIX}"'-[^".]*"' | sed 's/.*"name": *"\([^"]*\)"/\1/' | tail -1)
fi
if [ -n "$T4_NAME" ]; then
  T4_WORKFLOW="name=$T4_NAME"
else
  T4_WORKFLOW="No failover workflow found"
fi

# Get rollout final status
ROLLOUT=$(curl -s --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "$K8S/apis/argoproj.io/v1alpha1/namespaces/$NS/rollouts/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}")
COMPACT_R=$(echo "$ROLLOUT" | tr -d '\n' | tr -s ' ')
ROLLOUT_PHASE=$(echo "$COMPACT_R" | grep -oE '"phase": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/')
ROLLOUT_PHASE="${ROLLOUT_PHASE:-?}"
ROLLOUT_MSG=$(echo "$COMPACT_R" | grep -oE '"message": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/')
ROLLOUT_MSG="${ROLLOUT_MSG:-}"

T5=$(date +%s)

echo "  T0 (fault injected):     $T0"
echo "  T1 (alert pending):      $T1_PENDING"
echo "  T2 (alert firing):       $T2_ALERT"
echo "  T4 (failover workflow):  $T4_WORKFLOW"
echo "  T5 (collection time):    $T5"
echo ""

# Compute deltas
if [ "$T1_PENDING" != "N/A" ]; then
  DELTA_T0_T1=$((T1_PENDING - T0))
  echo "  T0→T1 (fault → alert pending): ${DELTA_T0_T1}s"
fi
if [ "$T2_ALERT" != "N/A" ]; then
  DELTA_T0_T2=$((T2_ALERT - T0))
  echo "  T0→T2 (fault → alert firing):  ${DELTA_T0_T2}s"
fi
if [ "$T1_PENDING" != "N/A" ] && [ "$T2_ALERT" != "N/A" ]; then
  DELTA_T1_T2=$((T2_ALERT - T1_PENDING))
  echo "  T1→T2 (pending → firing):      ${DELTA_T1_T2}s"
fi
DELTA_TOTAL=$((T5 - T0))
echo "  T0→T5 (total experiment):      ${DELTA_TOTAL}s"
echo ""

# Query current error rates from Prometheus
echo "=== Prometheus Metrics Snapshot ==="

if [ "$MODE" = "sidecar" ]; then
  ERR_Q="sum(rate(istio_requests_total{destination_app=\"podinfo\",destination_workload_namespace=\"$NS\",response_code=~\"5.*\",reporter=\"destination\"}[1m])) / sum(rate(istio_requests_total{destination_app=\"podinfo\",destination_workload_namespace=\"$NS\",reporter=\"destination\"}[1m]))"
  LAT_Q="histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(istio_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{destination_app=\"podinfo\",destination_workload_namespace=\"$NS\",reporter=\"destination\"}[1m])) by (le))"
else
  ERR_Q="sum(rate(istio_requests_total{destination_service_name=\"podinfo-stable\",destination_service_namespace=\"$NS\",response_code=~\"5.*\"}[1m])) / sum(rate(istio_requests_total{destination_service_name=\"podinfo-stable\",destination_service_namespace=\"$NS\"}[1m]))"
  LAT_Q="histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(istio_request_duration_milliseconds_bucket{destination_service_name=\"podinfo-stable\",destination_service_namespace=\"$NS\"}[1m])) by (le))"
fi

ERR_RATE=$(curl -sf "$PROM/api/v1/query" --data-urlencode "query=$ERR_Q" | \
  grep -oE '"value":\[[^,]+,"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4 | head -1)
ERR_RATE="${ERR_RATE:-no-data}"
P99_LAT=$(curl -sf "$PROM/api/v1/query" --data-urlencode "query=$LAT_Q" | \
  grep -oE '"value":\[[^,]+,"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4 | head -1)
P99_LAT="${P99_LAT:-no-data}"

echo "  Stable error rate (1m): $ERR_RATE"
echo "  Stable p99 latency (1m): ${P99_LAT}ms"
echo ""

echo "=== Rollout Final State ==="
echo "  Phase:   $ROLLOUT_PHASE"
echo "  Message: $ROLLOUT_MSG"
echo ""

FAULT_PCT={{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}}
FAILOVER_RAN="false"
if [ -n "$T4_NAME" ]; then
  FAILOVER_RAN="true"
fi

if [ "$ROLLOUT_PHASE" = "Healthy" ]; then
  if [ "$FAULT_PCT" -eq 0 ]; then
    OUTCOME="true_negative"
    echo "RESULT: PASS — No fault injected, canary promoted correctly (true negative)"
  elif [ "$FAILOVER_RAN" = "true" ]; then
    OUTCOME="remediated"
    echo "RESULT: PASS — Fault detected, failover promoted canary ($T4_NAME)"
  else
    OUTCOME="false_negative"
    echo "RESULT: FAIL — Fault injected but canary was NOT aborted (false negative)"
  fi
elif [ "$ROLLOUT_PHASE" = "Degraded" ]; then
  if [ "$FAULT_PCT" -eq 0 ]; then
    OUTCOME="false_positive"
    echo "RESULT: FAIL — No fault injected but canary was aborted (false positive)"
  else
    OUTCOME="remediated"
    echo "RESULT: PASS — Canary correctly rejected (phase=Degraded)"
  fi
else
  OUTCOME="incomplete"
  echo "RESULT: INCOMPLETE — Rollout phase=$ROLLOUT_PHASE (expected Healthy or Degraded)"
fi

echo ""
echo "============================================================"

# ── Structured JSON output for thesis analysis ──
# Emit null for N/A values so JSON stays valid
T1_JSON="${T1_PENDING}"; [ "$T1_JSON" = "N/A" ] && T1_JSON="null"
T2_JSON="${T2_ALERT}"; [ "$T2_JSON" = "N/A" ] && T2_JSON="null"
DT01="${DELTA_T0_T1:-null}"
DT12="${DELTA_T1_T2:-null}"
DT02="${DELTA_T0_T2:-null}"
cat > /tmp/timing.json <<ENDJSON
{
  "experiment_id": "$(cat /proc/sys/kernel/random/uuid 2>/dev/null || echo $RANDOM-$RANDOM)",
  "timestamp": "$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')",
  "mesh_mode": "$MODE",
  "fault_percentage": {{workflow.parameters.fault-percentage}},
  "traffic_duration_s": {{workflow.parameters.traffic-duration}},
  "timing": {
    "t0_fault_injected": $T0,
    "t1_alert_pending": $T1_JSON,
    "t2_alert_firing": $T2_JSON,
    "t4_failover_workflow": "$T4_WORKFLOW",
    "t5_collection": $T5
  },
  "deltas_seconds": {
    "t0_to_t1": $DT01,
    "t1_to_t2": $DT12,
    "t0_to_t2": $DT02,
    "t0_to_t5": $DELTA_TOTAL
  },
  "metrics_snapshot": {
    "stable_error_rate": "$ERR_RATE",
    "stable_p99_latency_ms": "$P99_LAT"
  },
  "rollout": {
    "phase": "$ROLLOUT_PHASE",
    "message": "$ROLLOUT_MSG"
  },
  "outcome": "$OUTCOME"
}
ENDJSON
echo "JSON artifact written to /tmp/timing.json"
echo "---TIMING-JSON-START---"
cat /tmp/timing.json
echo "---TIMING-JSON-END---"

TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)
CA=/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt
K8S=https://kubernetes.default.svc
VS="$K8S/apis/networking.istio.io/v1beta1/namespaces/podinfo/virtualservices/{{workflow.parameters.rollout-name}}"

echo "=== onExit: Removing sidecar fault injection ==="

VS_JSON=$(curl -sf --cacert $CA -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" "$VS" 2>/dev/null || echo "{}")
HAS_FAULT=$(echo "$VS_JSON" | grep -c '"fault"' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

if [ "$HAS_FAULT" -gt 0 ]; then
  HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sf -X PATCH \
    --cacert $CA \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
    "$VS" \
    -d '[{"op":"remove","path":"/spec/http/0/fault"}]' \
    -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}")
  echo "Fault removed (HTTP $HTTP_CODE)"
else
  echo "No fault found (has_fault=$HAS_FAULT) — nothing to clean up"
fi

echo "=== onExit: No persistent fault to clean up (app-level /status/503) ==="
echo "The /status/503 endpoint only affects the request that hits it."
